---
name: Refactoring Task
about: Code improvement and technical debt reduction
title: "[REFACTOR] "
labels: ["refactoring", "technical-debt"]
assignees: []

---

**Current Code Issues**
Describe the problems with the current code (SOLID violations, DRY violations, complexity, etc.)

**Files Affected**
- `file1.lua` (lines X-Y)
- `file2.lua` (lines A-B)

**Proposed Changes**
Describe how the code should be refactored

**Benefits**
- [ ] Improved maintainability
- [ ] Better testability
- [ ] Reduced complexity
- [ ] Better performance
- [ ] Follows SOLID principles
- [ ] Eliminates code duplication

**Acceptance Criteria**
- [ ] All existing functionality is preserved
- [ ] Code follows best practices
- [ ] Documentation is updated
- [ ] Tests pass (if applicable)

**Estimated Effort**
- [ ] Small (< 4 hours)
- [ ] Medium (4-8 hours)
- [ ] Large (> 8 hours)
